name: N4-(α-D-Glc-(1→2)-α-D-Glc… to N4-{β-D-GlcNAc-(1→2)-[β-D…
summary: A 11-step route from N4-(α-D-Glc-(1→2)-α-D-Glc-(1→3)-α-D-Glc-(1→3)-α-D-Man-(1→2)-α-D-Man-(1→2)-α-D-Man-(1→3)-[α-D-Man-(1→2)-α-D-Man-(1→3)-[α-D-Man-(1→2)-α-D-Man-(1→6)]-α-D-Man-(1→6)]-β-D-Man-(1→4)-β-D-GlcNAc-(1→4)-β-D-GlcNAc)-L-asparaginyl residue to N4-{β-D-GlcNAc-(1→2)-[β-D-GlcNAc-(1→4)]-α-D-Man-(1→3)-[β-D-GlcNAc-(1→2)-α-D-Man-(1→6)]-β-D-Man-(1→4)-β-D-GlcNAc-(1→4)-[α-L-Fuc-(1→6)]-β-D-GlcNAc}-Asn residue, ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.
